Hero.tag: Full Stack Developer · AI Product Builder
Hero.title: I turn ideas into digital products.
Hero.description: I build complete web products from concept to launch: clean interfaces, backend logic, databases, automation and AI-powered features.

About.title: What I bring
About.description: I am a software engineer who builds more than web pages. I transform product ideas into functional applications with real user flows, data, APIs and AI integrations. My strength is connecting technical execution with product thinking: understanding the problem, designing the flow and building the system behind it.

Projects.title: Products I have built
Projects.description: A selection of projects where I combine frontend, backend, databases, artificial intelligence, automation and product thinking.

aiProductMentor.description: An AI-powered product assistant that helps Product Owners move from messy ideas to structured user stories, PRDs and prioritization inputs.

lockPoint.description: A digital luggage storage system designed mainly for airports. It integrates three locations: Moscow, Kazan and Saint Petersburg, with reservations, admin management, email PIN delivery and operational logic.

latam.description: A real multilingual platform for the Latin American Association in Kazan, connecting events, procedures, representatives and chatbot support.

pigeonFree.description: An application designed to help people with columbophobia, commonly known as fear of pigeons, by creating safer urban routes through risk prediction using geodata, weather and city context.

Contact.title: Have an idea that needs to become a real product?
Contact.description: I am open to full-stack, frontend and AI product roles where I can build useful, practical and user-centered digital solutions.

askMaria.saludo: Hi! ✦ I'm AskMaria — ask me anything about Maria's experience, projects or skills.
